title: BlockFront
description: BlockFront is an action-packed Minecraft modification that allows players to immerse themselves in realistic combat during the Second World War.
body:
[![Patreon banner](https://www.blockfrontmc.com/image/curseforge/BlockFront_Curseforge_Banner_Patreon.png)](https://patreon.blockfrontmc.com) [![Discord banner](https://www.blockfrontmc.com/image/curseforge/BlockFront_Curseforge_Banner_Discord2.png)](https://discord.blockfrontmc.com) ![Logo](https://www.blockfrontmc.com/image/curseforge/BlockFront_Curseforge_Banner.png) **Welcome, Soldier!** Experience one of the world's most significant conflicts. With close-quarters battles in iconic WWII environments, pick your class, hold the front line, flank the enemy, and command your squad. ![Parliament Render](https://www.blockfrontmc.com/image/curseforge/BlockFront_Curseforge_Banner_Parliament.png) BlockFront is an action-packed Minecraft modification that allows players to immerse themselves in realistic combat during the Second World War. The mod is designed to give players an authentic experience of what it was like to fight in battles from the period. The mod includes various features such as weapons, vehicles, maps, special effects, realistic immersion, multiplayer matchmaking, in-game statistics and an official Discord server. ![Weapons](https://www.blockfrontmc.com/image/curseforge/Curseforge_Showcase_Banner_Weapons.png) **Weapons**
The mod includes a variety of weapons from the Second World War. Players can choose from rifles, submachine guns, pistols, and grenades. Each weapon has unique stats and effects, allowing players to customise their loadout. Players can use these weapons to take down enemy players and complete objectives. ![Tanks](https://www.blockfrontmc.com/image/curseforge/Curseforge_Showcase_Banner_Tanks.png) **Maps**
The mod features several maps based on real-world locations from the Second World War. Players can fight on maps like Stalingrad, Normandy, and Berlin. Each map is designed to provide an immersive experience for players, with realistic terrain, buildings, and other features. ![Maps](https://www.blockfrontmc.com/image/curseforge/Curseforge_Showcase_Banner_Maps.png) **Immersion**
The mod provides a highly immersive experience for players; realistic sounds, visuals, and animations help players feel like they are in the world of the Second World War. **Multiplayer Matchmaking**
Players can join matches with their friends worldwide through the mod's official multiplayer matchmaking system. This enhanced multiplayer experience also lets you view your in-game statistics, such as kills, deaths, streaks, achievements, rank progression and more. You can add and remove friends, join their games, create parties and invite players to your match. **Official Discord server**
The mod also includes an official Discord server where players can chat with each other, form clans, and get the latest news and updates about the game. The [Discord server](https://discord.blockfrontmc.com/) consists of a friendly, welcoming community moderated by a team of voluntary staff members. Both of which can help players with any issues. [![Discord banner](https://www.blockfrontmc.com/image/curseforge/BlockFront_Curseforge_Banner_Discord2.png)](https://discord.blockfrontmc.com) **Affiliation, Content and Compliance Disclaimer** BlockFront is a free-to-play Minecraft modification that provides a World War II multiplayer experience. We want to clarify that BlockFront is not affiliated with or endorsed by Mojang or Minecraft. Our mod is designed purely for entertainment purposes and does not involve any commercial transactions or in-game purchases. We strive to create a safe and enjoyable multiplayer environment for our community. Please note that any references to weapons, historical events, or any other content within the mod are solely for thematic purposes and do not endorse or promote violence or real-world conflicts. We are committed to maintaining compliance with all relevant guidelines and regulations to ensure the continued availability and enjoyment of the mod.
